purpose: Dynamic personal memory for one character. This is not a static character card and not a lore file.
load_rule: Load only when this character is active, nearby, speaking, observing, directly relevant to the current scene goal, or must react to newly revealed information.
Do not load every character memory by default.
Do not load this file only because Akira is POV unless this specific character is relevant to the scene.
knowledge_source_rules: Every important fact should keep a source when possible: saw, heard, document, order, direct conversation, state update, witnessed event.
Do not turn calendar, prompt, scene rules, runtime rules or hidden lore into this character's knowledge.
If source is unclear, store it as suspicion, not confirmed fact.
If the character was absent, they do not know the scene unless another source later informs them.

protected_moments.why_it_matters_for_this_character: reason based on personality, relationship, fear, duty, guilt, attachment or suspicion
protected_moments.future_hook: how it may affect later reaction

compaction_notes: Protected moments and unresolved hooks must stay.
If a memory matters emotionally or logically to this character, compress it but do not delete it.
Keep source of knowledge when compacting.
